things.name: Santa Ana Volcano Hike
things.description: Hike El Salvador's highest volcano (2,381m) with a volcanic crater lake

things.name: Parque Nacional Cerro Verde
things.description: Trio of volcanoes - Santa Ana, Izalco and Cerro Verde in cloud forest

things.name: Museo Nacional de Antropologia David J Guzman
things.description: El Salvador's finest pre-Columbian artefacts including the colossal Tazumal Maya site

things.name: Metropolitan Cathedral
things.description: Unfinished cathedral and the tomb of Archbishop Oscar Romero - martyr and saint

things.name: Mercado Ex-Cuartel
things.description: San Salvador's largest artisanal market with pupusas, handicrafts and hammocks

things.name: Zona Rosa Restaurant District
things.description: San Salvador's upscale dining quarter with the best Salvadoran cuisine

things.name: Joya de Ceren
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Maya village buried by a volcanic eruption - the Pompeii of the Americas

things.name: Pacific Surf Beaches (El Tunco)
things.description: World-class black sand surf beach 40km from the capital

things.name: El Imposible National Park
things.description: El Salvador's largest national park with cloud forest and rare wildlife

things.name: Pupusa with Curtido
things.description: El Salvador's national dish - stuffed masa corn cake with loroco flower and cheese
